import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useChat } from '../contexts/ChatContext'; import { useWallet } from '../contexts/WalletContext'; import { MessageSquare, Users, Lock, CheckCircle, XCircle, Crown, Plus, X } from 'lucide-react'; const Dashboard = () => { const { chatRooms, createRoom } = useChat(); const { walletAddress, ownedNFTs } = useWallet(); const [showCreateRoom, setShowCreateRoom] = useState(false); const [roomForm, setRoomForm] = useState({ name: '', description: '', requiredNFT: '' }); const formatAddress = (address) => { return `${address.slice(0, 6)}...${address.slice(-4)}`; }; return (

{chatRooms.filter(room => room.hasAccess).length}

{ownedNFTs.length}

Total Members

{chatRooms.reduce((sum, room) => sum + room.memberCount, 0)}

Chat Rooms

Access Granted Access Denied
{chatRooms.map((room) => (

{room.name}

{room.hasAccess ? ( ) : ( )} {room.isActive && (
)}

{room.description}

Required: {room.requiredNFT} • {room.memberCount} members
{room.hasAccess ? ( Enter Room ) : ( )}
))}

Your NFTs

{ownedNFTs.map((nft) => (

{nft.name}

{nft.collection}

Token ID: {nft.tokenId}

))}
); }; export default Dashboard;
